title: gymnogramma argentea
intro: Gymnogramma argentea, also known as silver fern, is a type of plant in the daisy family that is native to Australia and New Zealand. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating wounds and skin conditions due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Gymnogramma argentea include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and providing antioxidant protection. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as tinctures and infusions, can be used topically or taken internally to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
